notes: Computes BVUM (Business Value Under Management) per business over a 30-day observation window. Weights: outstanding receivables 40%, monthly credit issued 30%, recovery volume 15%, active debtors 10%, complexity 5%. Ceilings: starter/market ₦2M, business ₦20M, enterprise unlimited. Output is an upgrade RECOMMENDATION only — plan changes are always user-confirmed, never automatic; downgrades only after sustained sub-threshold BVUM. The Subscription screen renders the computed BVUM value (screen-backed READ); the computation/observation engine is backend-only.
